vocab.meaning: giá trị sử dụng thực tế
vocab.example: While some see watches as jewelry, I primarily wear mine for its utilitarian value during workouts.
Mechanical watches are often admired for their intricate craftsmanship and hundreds of tiny moving parts.

vocab.meaning: kỷ vật gia truyền đầy cảm xúc
vocab.example: This vintage Rolex is a sentimental heirloom passed down from my grandfather.
I don't really need a watch to tell the time, but I wear a bold one as a fashion statement.

vocab.meaning: tích hợp một cách liền mạch
vocab.example: Smartwatches seamlessly integrate with our smartphones to track health metrics in real-time.
Some argue that traditional wristwatches are becoming obsolescent in the age of digital devices.
In many high-end business circles, a luxury timepiece is considered a significant status symbol.
Wearing a watch helps me maintain a high level of punctuality throughout my busy workday.
For many professionals, a classic watch remains an indispensable accessory that completes a formal outfit.

vocab.meaning: sức hút về mặt cảm giác (chạm vào)
vocab.example: The tactile appeal of winding a manual watch every morning is something digital screens can't replicate.
